title: 拼图游戏C++版
content:
拼图游戏

开发环境：VS2022

开发语言：C语言

主体逻辑：将图片切分成任意块，并做相应的标识，使用二维数组来存储，并打乱顺序，然后根据鼠标左键按下的位置确定哪一小块的移动，最后如果数组有序了，说明图已经拼完成了。

分割图片：

#define WIDTH 500
#define HEIGHT 500
#define SIZE 100
#define ROW 5
#define COL 5

IMAGE img;	//原始图片
IMAGE imgs[ROW * COL]; //二维数组转换为一维数组进行操作
int map[ROW][COL];	//使用数字来表示图片的每一小块
void init() {
	loadimage(&img, "1.jpg", WIDTH, HEIGHT);
	SetWorkingImage(&img);	//设置工作图片，在该图片中操作
	for (int i = 0; i < ROW; i++) {
		for (int j = 0; j < COL; j++) {
			getimage(&imgs[i * COL + j], j * SIZE, i * SIZE, SIZE, SIZE);
			map[i][j] = i * COL + j;
		}
	}
	SetWorkingImage();
	loadimage(&imgs[ROW * COL - 1], "black.png", 100, 100);

    //打乱顺序
	for (int i = 0; i < ROW; i++) {
		for (int j = 0; j < COL; j++) {
			int r = rand() % ROW;
			int c = rand() % COL;
			int temp = map[i][j];
			map[i][j] = map[r][c];
			map[r][c] = temp;
		}
	}
}

画图

bool isPeek = false;
void draw() {
	setlinecolor(WHITE);
	for (int i = 0; i < ROW; i++) {
		for (int j = 0; j < COL; j++) {
			putimage(j * SIZE, i * SIZE, &imgs[map[i][j]]);
			line(0, i * SIZE, WIDTH, i * SIZE);		//竖线
			line(j * SIZE, 0, j * SIZE, HEIGHT);	//横线
		}
	}
	if (isPeek)	//是否查看原图
		putimage(0, 0, &img);
}

用户交互

//查找空白图
void searchSpace(int* x, int* y) {
	for (int i = 0; i < ROW; i++) {
		for (int j = 0; j < COL; j++) {
			if (map[i][j] == ROW * COL - 1) {
				*x = i;
				*y = j;
				return;
			}
		}
	}
}

void play() {
	ExMessage msg;
	int x, y, row, col;
	if (peekmessage(&msg, EM_MOUSE)) {
		if (msg.message == WM_LBUTTONDOWN) {
			searchSpace(&x, &y);
			row = msg.y / SIZE;
			col = msg.x / SIZE;
			if (
				(row == x - 1 && col == y) || //空的左边
				(row == x + 1 && col == y) || //空的右边
				(row == x && col == y + 1) || //空的下边
				(row == x && col == y - 1)	  //空的上边
				) {
				int temp = map[x][y];
				map[x][y] = map[row][col];
				map[row][col] = temp;
			}
		}
		else if (msg.message == WM_RBUTTONDOWN) {
			isPeek = true;
		}
		else if (msg.message == WM_RBUTTONUP) {
			isPeek = false;
		}
	}
}

判断游戏是否结束

bool gameOver() {
	int* p = (int*)map;
	for (int i = 0; i < ROW; i++) {
		for (int j = 0; j < COL; j++) {
			if (p[i * COL + j + 1] - p[i * COL + j] != 1)
				return false;
		}
	}
	return true;
}

主函数代码

int main()
{
	srand((unsigned int)time(NULL));
	initgraph(WIDTH, HEIGHT);
	init();
	BeginBatchDraw();
	while (1) {
		cleardevice();
		draw();
		play();
		if (gameOver())break;
		FlushBatchDraw();
	}
	EndBatchDraw();
	MessageBox(GetHWnd(), "恭喜你获得一个美女", "提示", MB_OK);
	closegraph();
	return 0;
}
